analysis_commentary: lr_warmup_steps 500→1500 avoided the full max=1.0 collapse (max stayed [0.109, 0.618], grad_norm peak 66, no value saturation) but illegal_mass pinned 0.998-1.0 throughout with aboveU=0 — no legal-move learning. Vs current best (illegal_min=0.235, aboveU_max=7) this is strictly worse on goal metrics. Warmup=1500 shifted dynamics toward a stalled-but-not-collapsed regime, similar to the over-regularized entropy=0.01 run we saw earlier.
